economic_notes: HIAH Economic Dev LP engaged in business ventures and partnerships for general welfare/development of First Nation. MERE General Partner Inc. owned and controlled by First Nation. Investments in U.C.C.M. Building Material Supply LP (14.28%), M'Nidoo M'Nising LP (16.55%), Robinson Huron Forestry Inc. (12.5%), Sun Life Financial Inc. (6,636 shares), Great Lakes Hospitality Group Partnership (29.44%).
notes: Expenses_health combines Health Services ($1,475,276) + Health Agreement ($1,518,860). HIAH Economic Dev LP and HIAH Corp consolidated at 99.99%/100%. MERE General Partner Inc. accounted for on modified equity basis with advances of $3,799,609 outstanding. Restricted cash includes $1,580,408 for CMHC agreements and $93,853 for endowed education fund. No schedule of remuneration included in this document. COVID-19 effects noted (Note 16). Community Property expense $390,668 and Employment and Training $651,290 not mapped to standard categories.
